description: The Lapras + Regidrago core — considered the best two-Pokémon core in the cup. Add a third that beats Cresselia and Oranguru (e.g. Crustle with Rock Wrecker).

sources.author: YasserPoGO
sources.videoTitle: TOP TEAMS in the Retro Cup Great League | Pokemon GO PvP

description: The Regidrago + Oranguru core — buffed dragon damage with no steel/fairy to resist it, paired with buffed Confusion + Trailblaze Oranguru. Flex the third slot between Lapras (Ice Beam) and Cetitan/Celio (Powder Snow chip).

sources.author: YasserPoGO
sources.videoTitle: TOP TEAMS in the Retro Cup Great League | Pokemon GO PvP
